# Wintour’s Fresh Mess, David Ellison’s Punch List & Trump’s New Scapegoat

**Source:** inputs/saved_html/=UTF-8qWintour=E2=80=99s_Fresh_Mess,_David_Ellison=E2=80=99s_Punch_Lis=
 =UTF-8qt_&_Trump=E2=80=99s_New_Scapegoat=_Sat,_19_Oct_2024_13-46-18_+0000_192a5077ab9ceb3a.html
**Processed:** 2025-08-24T19:12:57.762978

Thanks for reading The Backstory, your weekly review of the best new work emanating from Puck. It was another incredible week: Matt Belloni got the readout on David Ellison’s welcome tour at Paramount; Dylan Byers revealed the latest antics in Nuzzi-gate; Lauren Sherman diagnosed a fresh Anna Wintour headache; John Ourand unearthed an NFL mean girls scandalette; Rachel Strugatz got to the bottom of a Glossier reboot; Eriq Gardner pulled the file on a bonkers new cable lawsuit.
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  | | --- | | [The Backstory](https://email.puck.) | | |  | | --- | | Good morning,     It was another incredible week: **Matt Belloni** got the readout on **David Ellison** ’s welcome tour at Paramount; **Dylan Byers** revealed the latest antics in **Nuzzi** -gate; **Lauren Sherman** diagnosed a fresh **Anna Wintour** headache; **John Ourand** unearthed an NFL mean girls scandalette; **Rachel Strugatz** got to the bottom of a Glossier reboot; **Eriq Gardner** pulled the file on a bonkers new cable lawsuit; **Bill Cohan** broke the news on a **Ronald Perelman** miracle; and **Marion Maneker** captured the art market mood during the London sales. Meanwhile, **John Heilemann** assessed the **Kamala** bedwetting; **Peter Hamby** surveyed the Gen Z vote; **Abby Livingston** covered the Capitol Hill fundraising games; and **Tara Palmeri** canvassed the Mar-a-Lago crowd.     Check out these stories, and others, via the links below. And stick around for the backstory on how it all came together. |   | |  | | --- | |  | | | **FASHION:**   **Lauren Sherman**  [investigates](https://email.puck.) the latest Condé Nast micro controversy.   *and…*   **Rachel Strugatz**  [explains](https://email.puck.) Glossier’s new fragrance play.     **ART MARKET:**   **Marion Maneker** has [all the news](https://email.puck.) on the latest **Hockney** , **Koons** , and **Ruscha** sales in London.     **HOLLYWOOD:**   **Matt Belloni**  [peruses](https://email.puck.) the new Netflix numbers and [captures](https://email.puck.) the anxiety inside Paramount.   *and…*   **Eriq Gardner**  [gets to the bottom](https://email.puck.) of the *Live PD* scandal.   *meanwhile…*   **Scott Mendelson**  [chronicles](https://email.puck.) the heartwarming *Terrifier 3* success story.     **WALL STREET:**   **Bill Cohan**  [solves](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvYS1yb24tcGVyZWxtYW4tbWVkaWNhbC1teXN0ZXJ5LXNvbHZlZC8_) a **Ronald Perelman** mystery and [envisions](https://email.puck.) private equity’s future.     **MEDIA:**   **Dylan Byers**  [probes](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvaXRzLWNicy1uZXdzLWNoaWVmLXdlbmR5LW1jbWFob25zLXR1cm4taW4tdGhlLWJhcnJlbC8_) the CBS News crying rooms.   *and…*   **John Ourand**  [pulls string](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvZXNwbi1hYmMtbW9uZGF5LW5pZ2h0LWZvb3RiYWxsLXNpbXVsY2FzdC1oYXMtcml2YWxzLW5ldHdvcmtzLWhvdC8_) on a *Monday Night Football* quagmire.     **WASHINGTON:**   **Tara Palmeri**  [gets all](https://email.puck.) the Mar-a-Lago gossip as **John Heilemann**  [weighs](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3Mvd2lsbC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktbWFyay10aGUtZW5kLW9mLXRoZS1nb3AtYXMtd2Uta25vdy1pdC8_) Democrats’ fears.   *and…*   **Peter Hamby**  [assesses](https://email.puck.) the Gen Z voters’ vibes.     **PODCASTS:**   John Ourand chats with CAA Sports’ **Matt Kramer** about the future of sports media salaries on *[The Varsity](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2luc2lkZS13b2pzLWVzcG4tZXhpdC8_)* .   *and…*   John Heilemann goes deep with Rep. **Debbie Dingell** on Michigan’s electoral map on *[Impolitic](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2RlYmJpZS1kaW5nZWxsLXBhbmljLWluLWRldHJvaXQtZGFuY2luZy1pbi1sYW5zaW5nLXN0cmFuZGVkLWluLWthbGFtYXpvby8_)* .   *and…*   Matt and legendary TV chronicler **James Andrew Miller** discuss *SNL* at 50 on *[The Town](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL3RoZS1uZXctZXJhLW9mLXNubC01MHRoLXBsYW5zLWFuZC1zYXR1cmRheS1uaWdodC8_)* .   *and…*   Tara and **John McLaughlin** , Trump’s pollster, run the numbers on *[Somebody’s Gotta Win](https://email.puck.)* .   *and…*   Lauren talks to her childhood hero **Jane Pratt** on *[Fashion People](https://email.puck.)* .   *and…*   Peter and Bill investigate **James Dolan** ’s debt crisis on *[The Powers That Be](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2lzLWRvbGFucy1zcGhlcmUtYS1kZWJ0LWJvbWItMi8_)* .     *As a reminder, you can update your profile at any time to get more stories like these directly in your inbox. [Click here](https://email.puck.) to customize your email settings.* |   | |  | | --- | | **Monday Night Lights** | | | On Monday evening, I did something slightly unusual: I left the office early and headed to the Meadowlands to watch my New York Jets take on the Bills. I’ve been a Jets fan since childhood, a bizarre and unforced affliction in an otherwise happy life, and it’s an affinity that I’ve regrettably handed down to my children. I’d been looking forward to the game all weekend: Not only had the Jets recently replaced their head coach, adding an element of intrigue to the game, but I also love the pomp and theater of live sports, especially professional football. Since it was *Monday Night Football* , ESPN would be dispatching its full team and all the agents would be in town to talk business, dap up celebrities, and scour for information. In other words, it seemed like it was going to be an evening brimming with sports and gossip—two of my favorite pastimes.     I was attending the game with two iconic veterans of the industry: **Connor Schell** , the utterly brilliant founder of Words + Pictures and the former head of content at ESPN, who co-created *30 for 30* and executive produced both *O.J.: Made in America* and *The Last Dance* , perhaps the two most profoundly impactful documentaries of the past decade; and **Peter Schrager** , the NFL Network morning show host and Fox NFL analyst, who happens to be this generation’s heir to **Peter King** . Indeed, attending an NFL game with Schrager, in particular, is sort of like riding through Vatican City in the Popemobile: *Everyone* came up to him on the sidelines before the game to pay their respects. At some point, even **Fireman Ed** , the team’s vociferous and Jumbotron-ready super fan, kissed the ring—even as **J.B. Smoove** and **50 Cent** , among others, milled about.     But my favorite moment of the evening didn’t even occur between the white lines—the Jets blew it in the fourth quarter, inevitably—but rather during the pregame. As we were milling about on the sidelines, shortly after 7 p.m., I noticed a number of agents, P.R. executives, and entourage members stare down at their phones, one by one, like a chorus line. I was unsure precisely what they were looking at until I heard one of them mumble, *Ourand is out* . Indeed, the latest issue of [The Varsity](https://email.puck.) , my partner **John Ourand** ’s brilliant private email on the sports media business, had popped into their inboxes only moments earlier and they were reading it like doorbusters at Walmart on Black Friday. I even had the funny pleasure of standing beside CAA Sports agent **Matt Kramer** as he read a piece about himself. It was both meta and heady—a true testament to John’s singular influence in the industry, and what he has created here at Puck.     Coincidentally, only a few days earlier, the ESPN chairman **Jimmy Pitaro** had quietly come to an agreement with the NFL to co-broadcast six additional *Monday Night Football* games on ABC, its sister broadcast network, starting with that very Jets-Bills contest. And while that might not seem like an enormous concession, it was actually quite a powder keg in the ever-metamorphosing media world. Not only was Disney, the parent company, foregoing ESPN’s cable exclusivity, but this was naturally going to enrage the NFL’s other *broadcast* partners. After all, NBC markets its enormously valuable Sunday night package as the only primetime broadcast deal. A few days earlier, NFL Media C.O.O. **Hans Schroeder** had broken the ABC simulcast news to executives at NBC and Fox and CBS, all of whom manifested emotions on the outer edge of the rage spectrum.     If you only have time to read one story this weekend, I’d urge you to turn your attention to John’s excellent piece, *[Is Goodell Picking Favorites?](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvZXNwbi1hYmMtbW9uZGF5LW5pZ2h0LWZvb3RiYWxsLXNpbXVsY2FzdC1oYXMtcml2YWxzLW5ldHdvcmtzLWhvdC8_)* Even if you have little interest in sports, or even the business of sport, the story articulates how deeply the future of the world’s largest media conglomerates relies on their relationship with the NFL, one of the last ballasts of American monoculture. Indeed, this latest ESPN-ABC simulcast deal perfectly represented The Shield’s power. The league wanted to increase the viewership for *Monday Night Football* , so it broadcast the game on a second network. And it did so because it *could* . These days, after all, CBS owner Paramount Global has a market capitalization of around $7.5 billion, which is just a little more than Apollo co-founder **Josh Harris** paid for the Commanders a year ago, and probably around what the Seahawks will fetch when **Paul Allen** ’s sister puts the team on the market—perhaps enticing **Jeff Bezos** . Indeed, this is one of the great dynamics of our time, and precisely what you should expect from Puck.     Have a great weekend,   Jon | | | |  | | --- | |  | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dTcFFaWEhzUC13UXMzaHhiVE40WT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
